value: Global arms flows increased nearly 10% in 2025 compared with the previous period (SIPRI)
SIPRI Arms Transfers Database updated (includes transfers 2021–25); authoritative open-source dataset for major conventional arms
Wassenaar Arrangement control lists and munitions list corrigenda published (2025–2026 updates): dual-use and conventional export controls maintained by participating states
US ITAR §126.7 final rule published (Dec 30, 2025) — amendments introduce exemptions to facilitate defence cooperation among certain partners
DDTC monthly license volumes and Average Processing Time (APT) for Apr–Sep 2025 indicate APT in the ~25–31 day range and regular Received/Adjudicated volumes
NATO Allies committed (2025 Summit) to a target of investing 5% of GDP annually on defence and security by 2035
NIST Cybersecurity Framework (CSF 2.0) updates and public consultations (Apr 2026); relevant for defence-sector cyber risk management and supply-chain controls
notes: NIST CSF 2.0 pages and release notes

value: ENISA published the Cybersecurity Market Analysis Framework (ECSMAF) v3.0 (26 Mar 2026) — guidance for cybersecurity market analysis and monitoring
US Cyber Command announced an AI roadmap to integrate AI across cyber operations (scaling analytics, operational integration) — strategic implication for cyber-warfare capability development
US Space Force EPS‑R achieved operational acceptance, extending secure Arctic SATCOM capabilities into the 2030s
Netherlands awarded RTX (Raytheon) a $627 million contract for Patriot air and missile defence equipment (Apr 2026)
핵심 공급망: 추진(엔진), 센서·레이더·EO/IR, 통신·전자전(EW), 항공전자(Avionics), 미사일·유도탄, 탄약·폭약, 복합재·구조체, 소프트웨어·C2·시뮬레이션, 테스트·검증 설비
notes: Prime 업체 공개 페이지 및 산업 요약

value: UNODA (UN Office for Disarmament Affairs) provides multilateral disarmament instruments and resources useful for treaty/controls reference
